title: tournefortia microcalyx
intro: Tournefortia microcalyx is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the forget-me-not family, native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tournefortia microcalyx include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate symptoms of allergies. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote immune function and support overall well-being.
